docs.title: River Water Levels
docs.text:
• River Level and Temp info
    • The Salaca observation points are:
      • Mazsalaca 15km into the race
      • Lagaste 80km in at the start of the rapids
      • Salacagriva 100km at the Finish

docs.title: Tides
docs.text:
• There are no meaningful tides in the BALTIC BUT Heavy wind can drive water into the river mouths and make them feel slightly tidal.

Check the wind forecast for strong westerly's.
